all.zh: 主旨：遠端工作政策更新

all.en: Following extensive consultation with department heads and employee representatives, management is pleased to introduce a revised remote work policy effective October 1.
all.zh: 經過與各部門主管及員工代表的廣泛諮詢後，管理階層欣然推出修訂版遠端工作政策，自 10 月 1 日起生效。

all.en: Under the new framework, eligible employees may work remotely up to three days per week.
all.zh: 根據新框架，符合資格的員工每週最多可遠端工作三天。

all.en: To qualify, an employee must have completed at least six months of continuous service in their current position.
all.zh: 符合資格者，必須已在目前職位連續任職至少六個月。

all.en: Performance evaluations from the most recent review cycle must also rate the employee as meeting or exceeding expectations.
all.zh: 最近一次考核週期的績效評估也必須達到或超過預期。

all.en: Roles that require on-site presence, such as laboratory technicians and front-desk personnel, are not eligible at this time.
all.zh: 需要現場出勤的職務，例如實驗室技術員及櫃台人員，目前不符合資格。

all.en: Employees who wish to participate must submit a formal application through the HR online portal at least 14 days before the requested start date.
all.zh: 希望參與的員工必須在預定開始日期前至少 14 天，透過 HR 線上入口網站提交正式申請。

all.en: The application must be approved by both the immediate supervisor and the department director.
all.zh: 申請必須獲得直屬主管及部門總監雙方核准。

all.en: Approved participants are required to maintain consistent core working hours from 10:00 A.M. to 3:00 P.M., regardless of location.
all.zh: 獲准參與者必須維持一致的核心工作時間，即上午 10 點至下午 3 點，無論身處何處。

all.en: All remote workers must ensure they have a secure internet connection and a quiet, professional workspace.
all.zh: 所有遠端工作者必須確保擁有安全的網路連線及安靜、專業的工作空間。

all.en: The company will provide a one-time stipend of 300 dollars to assist with home office setup.
all.zh: 公司將提供一次性 300 美元的津貼，協助居家辦公室設置。

all.en: Participants must attend in-person team meetings every Tuesday and any client meetings designated as on-site.
all.zh: 參與者必須出席每週二的實體團隊會議，以及任何指定為現場的客戶會議。

all.en: The arrangement will be reviewed every six months to ensure it continues to meet both employee and business needs.
all.zh: 此安排將每六個月檢討一次，以確保持續符合員工及業務需求。

all.en: Detailed guidelines and the application form are available on the company intranet under the Human Resources tab.
all.zh: 詳細指南及申請表可於公司內部網路的人力資源頁面取得。

all.en: Questions regarding the new policy may be directed to your HR business partner.
all.zh: 有關新政策的問題，可向您的 HR 業務夥伴詢問。
